note: 12-sample leakage-free preview (fold-contained scaling+residualization). Superseded by expanded-cohort run when downloads finish.
interpretation: Raw antigen-presentation axis separates response, but at n=12 the signal is largely INFILTRATION-DRIVEN: after fold-contained residualization on an immune-infiltration score, the tumor-intrinsic residual is only LOO 0.61-0.69. Whether a tumor-intrinsic component survives requires the expanded cohort (n~40).
